'''鈭歳-ng-sh-ng''' ('''karangshengoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wedgie|wedgie]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-ng-sh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wedgie|wedgie]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歳-ng-sh-ng
|-
! Lemma
| karangshengoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirangshengoko|thirangshengoko]] || [[word:jirangshengoko|jirangshengoko]] || [[word:shirangshengoko|shirangshengoko]] || [[word:kirangshengoko|kirangshengoko]]
|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
